expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly frames the benchmark focus and the required-before-ship gate mechanism: "This benchmark case checks phase5b checkpoint enforcement with the focus: “historical analogs become required-before-ship gates.”" and "Phase 5b requires that relevant historical analogs be promoted into explicit, blocking before-ship gates (`[ANALOG-GATE]`)."

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The outputs are explicitly Phase 5b oriented and reference Phase 5b required artifacts and rubric: execution_notes.md: "Checked reference.md for required Phase 5b artifacts: `checkpoint_audit`, `checkpoint_delta`, `qa_plan_phase5b`." result.md: "Primary phase under test: **Phase 5b**" and a Phase 5b contract section detailing `[ANALOG-GATE]` requirements and Phase 5b artifacts (checkpoint audit/delta, phase5b draft).
